## ERT1.2. Rate of planning via available airspace structures (PI#10) {#ert1.2.-rate-of-planning-via-available-airspace-structures-pi10 .Heading-2-ER}

CYPRUS reports that:

-The ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **29%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- No data provided regarding the ratio of planning airspace structures via available conditional routes (CDR)
